ddls:
CREATE TABLE "identities" (
  "identity_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each identity */,
  "identity_name" TEXT /* Name of the identity */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the identity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("identity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_references" (
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source providing the reference */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the reference */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reference */,
  "external_id" TEXT /* External identifier for the reference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., viewer, contributor, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "tool_id" TEXT /* ID of the tool being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the tool */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the tool was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tool_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "tool_id" TEXT /* ID of the tool */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Changes made in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tool_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "tool_id" TEXT /* ID of the tool being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tool_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "tool_id" TEXT /* ID of the tool being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving the rating */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the rating was given */,
  "rating_score" REAL /* Score of the rating (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tool_categories" (
  "tool_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tool-category relationship */,
  "tool_id" TEXT /* ID of the tool */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tool_category_id")
)
